notes-north: Only the entry portion of the tone realised - lands at bottom.
notes-central: Full tone realised - dip then up.
notes-south: Full tone realised - dip then up.  'o' sound higher and further forward compared to north.

notes-north: Only entry portion of tone realised in đảm.  Notice 'a' in can and 'a' in đảm have different articulation points - đảm furhter forward, more like ae.
notes-central: Full tone realised.  'A' in both words is forward 'ae'. Final 'n' in 'can' sounds like 'ng'.
notes-south: Both 'a' further forward like 'ae'.  Final 'n' is realised as 'ng'.

notes-north: Higher pitch onset of Hỏi tone, also notice the short vowel and abrubt stop of nạng tone in thận.
notes-central: Throat more relaxed allowing longer vowel length and full realisation of thone.
notes-south: Longer vowel length allowing full realisation of tones.  Also, final 'n' in thận moving closer to 'ng'.

notes-north: Full 'break' in voice for vễ tone.
notes-central: Full break in voice for vễ tone.
notes-south: Broken vẽ tone loses break - turns into vẻ.

notes-north: Full break in voice for xã.
notes-central: Full break in voice for xã.
notes-south: Softer break in voice for xã - closer to xả.

notes-north: Final 'ch' pronounced as 'k' - sẽ has full break in voice.
notes-central: 'S' in sạch turns into 'sh'. Final 'ch' turns into 't'.  sẽ has full break in tone.
notes-south: Final 'ch' turns into 't'.  Sẽ tone softens to become Sẻ.

notes-north: D realised as 'z'.
notes-central: D realised as 'y'.  Final 'n' turns into 'ng'. The AO vowel moved forward to aeow.
notes-south: D turns into 'y' and 'ao' is very forward - aeow.

notes-north: The âu in dâu and tây are different - dâu further back, but tây moves forward as need palatisation at end for y in tây
notes-central: D realised as 'y'.
notes-south: D realised as 'y'.

notes-north: D realised as 'z'. Full break in dễ tone.
notes-central: D realised as 'y'.
notes-south: D realised as 'y'.  Dẽ tone turns into Dẻ.

notes-north: R realised as 'z'
notes-central: R realised as cerebral, tapped 'r'.  A in ràng more forward as 'ae'.
notes-south: R fully retroflex 'r' and 'a' is forward as 'ae'.

notes-north: R realised as 'z'. Rẩy tone only half realised to bottom of dip.
notes-central: R is cerebral flap.
notes-south: R retroflex 'r' flap.

notes-north: R realised as a 'z'
notes-central: R cerebral flap.  Final 'n' in Con turns to ng.
notes-south: R is retroflex 'r' flap.

notes-north: A normal short back.  N - normal final n.
notes-central: Final 'n' moves towards soft 'ng'.
notes-south: Final 'n' turns to soft 'ng' - note mouth lateral 'smile'.

notes-north: I normal I- slighly long, n normal n.
notes-central: I moving back closer to ư, final n turns to ng.
notes-south: I moves back to ư and final n to ng.

notes-north: Final thiện tone very short - glottal stop.
notes-central: Final 'n' turns to 'ng'.  Ie turns to long i.
notes-south: Final n turns into ng. Ie turns into long i.

notes-north: Final nh palatised nh verging on 'ng'
notes-central: Final 'nh' realised as 'n' - vowel shifts back to ư.
notes-south: Final 'nh' realised as 'n' - vowel shifts back to ư.

notes-north: Final nh palatised. quả tone only half realised.
notes-central: Final 'nh' becomes 'n'. Ch more forward becomes 'c'.
notes-south: Final 'nh' becomes 'n'. Ch more forward becomes 'c'.

notes-north: Final nh palatised. Final 'ng' also has closed lips
notes-central: Final 'ng' has closed lips.  Nh turns into n.
notes-south: Final ng has closed lips, final nh turns into 'n' and i before nh turns into ư.

notes-north: Clear 'i', palatised 'nh'
notes-central: I turns to ư, nh turns to n.
notes-south: kiếng instead of kính. Keeps ie as long i. Nh turns to n.

notes-north: T normal
notes-central: Final T becomes C
notes-south: Final T becomes C

notes-north: T normal
notes-central: Final T become C
notes-south: Final T become C. A in thà further forward -> ae.

notes-north: Glottalised T
notes-central: Glottalised T to point of not touching palate.
notes-south: Glottalisation of T turns into glottalised k.

notes-north: I is i, Ch is C.
notes-central: I becomes ư, final Ch palatised to t.
notes-south: I becomes ư, final Ch palatised to t.

notes-north: Final ch is 'k', a in sạn very short and killed low.
notes-central: Final Ch becomes t, s becomes 'sh' and tone longer ending in clear 'n'
notes-south: Final ch is t, final n is 'ng'.

notes-north: Final ch is 'k'
notes-central: Final ch is 't' - lips close on t.
notes-south: Final ch is t.

notes-south: ie becomes shorter i.
